scene_description:
### Foreground  
- **Road surface**: Paved asphalt road occupies the lower half of the image. Double solid yellow lines run down the center, with a single white line along the left edge. The road surface is smooth with minor wear.  
- **Curb**: A concrete curb runs along the left edge of the road (left foreground), separating the road from a dirt area with dry vegetation and scattered debris.  
- **Vehicle**: A light gold sedan is parked on the right side of the road (right foreground). It is a four-door sedan with a blurred license plate (no readable characters). The car is positioned on a gravel/dirt shoulder next to the road.  
- **Street lamp**: A tall metal pole with dual lamp heads (one on each side of the pole) is visible on the right edge (mid-foreground, near the parked car).  

### Midground  
- **Utility pole**: A wooden utility pole with a crossbar and multiple horizontal wires (4 visible) stands on the left edge (left midground). Insulators are attached to the crossbar.  
- **Fencing**: A fence made of vertical, dry reed-like materials (1–2 meters high) runs parallel to the road on the left (left midground), extending from the left edge toward the center. The fence has a brown color and no visible end treatments.  
- **Trees**:  
  - On the left midground, 3–4 green deciduous trees with dense foliage stand behind the reed fence.  
  - On the right midground, a large tree with red-brown leaves is visible (center-right background), along with a tall palm tree (right background) and additional dense green trees.  
- **Buildings**:  
  - A single-story white building with a flat roof (center-right background) has a concrete facade.  
  - A building with a red-tiled roof is partially visible behind the white building (further right background).  

### Background  
- **Open fields**: On the left background, dry, open fields with sparse grass and scattered trees extend to the horizon. The terrain is flat.  
- **Sky**: Clear blue sky (upper half of the image) with no clouds.  

### Text & Signs  
No visible text, signs, road name signs, shop signs, banners, or stickers are present in the image.  

### Infrastructure  
- **Bollards/barriers**: None visible.  
- **Traffic lights**: None.  
- **Fire hydrants**: None.  
- **Guardrails/fences**: Only the reed fence (left midground) is visible (no additional guardrails).  

### Road Surface & Markings  
- **Line colors**: Double solid yellow lines (center), white line (left edge).  
- **Curb**: Concrete (left side).  
- **Driving side**: Right-hand traffic (evidenced by the parked car on the right side of the road).  

### Buildings & Architecture  
- **Roof types**: The white building has a flat roof; the building behind it has a red-tiled roof.  
- **Facade materials**: The white building has a concrete facade.  

### Vegetation & Terrain  
- **Tree types**: Deciduous trees (left midground), palm tree (right background), and dense green trees (right midground).  
- **Terrain**: Flat (open fields on the left, road extends straight into the distance).  

No elements are absent from the description; all visible objects are accounted for.

details.name: double yellow lines
details.reason: The combination of double yellow center lines and a white edge line helps identify specific road marking standards.
details.focused_description: Two parallel yellow lines running along the center of the road. The lines are painted on asphalt, yellow in color, and show signs of fading. They are straight, evenly spaced, and form a continuous double line marking. No text is visible on the lines.

details.name: wooden utility pole
details.reason: The design of the crossbar and insulators on the pole is a useful infrastructure clue.
details.focused_description: A wooden utility pole is visible. It is a tall, vertical, cylindrical structure made of wood. The main body is light gray-brown with a distinct yellow painted band near the upper section (above the lower cross arm). The wood shows signs of weathering. No text is visible on the pole.

details.name: metal street lamp
details.reason: The dual-head design of the street lamp can serve as a regional identifier.
details.focused_description: A tall, cylindrical metal street lamp with a light gray/silver finish. The pole supports two rectangular, angular light housings at the top, each with a flat, extended face. The structure appears solid and in good condition, with no visible text or markings.

details.name: palm tree
details.reason: The presence of a palm tree helps narrow the search to tropical or subtropical regions.
details.focused_description: A palm tree with a tall trunk and a crown of long, green fronds (some fronds show hints of yellow). The fronds are spread out, with some appearing slightly blurred, likely due to motion. The tree's structure includes the typical palm tree shape with multiple fronds extending from the top.

details.name: red-tiled roof
details.reason: Red-tiled roofs are a characteristic architectural feature of certain geographic regions.
details.focused_description: The red-tiled roof features rows of reddish-brown ceramic tiles arranged in a sloped, overlapping pattern. The tiles appear intact and uniform in color, with no visible text or distinct markings.
